_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of planning for long-term maintainability using architectural structures, viewpoints, styles, design decisions and frameworks, and the underlying data structures.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope definition, workstream structure, milestone schedule, resource plan, and risk register.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-A-001 (DA, cosine: 0.496), DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.488).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.488). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [architectural, decisions, design, frameworks, knowledge, long] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain, milestone] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.869, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (94.6%). "Knowledge of planning for long-term maintainability using architectural structur" and "Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.512 ≈ STS 0.488 (gap 0.024). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [architectural, decisions, design, frameworks, knowledge, long]. WIDAI-only: [ai, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain, milestone].
